headline: How ETF investors are gearing up for the space frontier
summary: SpaceX is due to go public next month and is arguably the most widely anticipated IPO of the year. What constitutes a successful initial public offering, not just for a company, but for investors? And what needs to happen for other firms in the industry to keep the momentum going? Mike Akins, founding partner of ETF Action, joins CNBC’s Dominic Chu on “Halftime Report” to discuss all of this and more.
